| Property                                                                                                                                                    | Pattern | Type             | Deprecated | Definition                                                                                                                      | Title/Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- | ---------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| - [additional_accounts](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_additional_accounts )                 | No      | array of string  | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Array of additional AWS account IDs for cross-account resource deployment enabling                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| - [additional_context](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_additional_context )                   | No      | object           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Deprecated additional CDK context specification replaced by context property for consistent configuration management                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| - [additional_stacks](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_additional_stacks )                     | No      | array            | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Array of additional deployment configurations for multi-stack and multi-region deployment scenarios                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| - [allow_cross_reference_stack](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_allow_cross_reference_stack ) | No      | boolean          | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Enable this flag to allow native cross region stack references.<br />Enabling this will create a CloudFormation custom resource in both the producing stack and consuming stack in order to perform the export/import.<br />Required for resources that must be created in us-east-1 but referenced from other regions (e.g., WAF ACLs for CloudFront) |
| - [app_config_data](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_app_config_data )                         | No      | object           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Deprecated application configuration data replaced by module_config_data for consistent configuration management                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| - [app_configs](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_app_configs )                                 | No      | array of string  | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Deprecated application configuration file paths replaced by module_configs for consistent configuration management                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| - [cdk_app](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_cdk_app )                                         | No      | string           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Deprecated CDK application path specification replaced by module_path for consistent module sourcing                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| - [context](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_context )                                         | No      | object           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | CDK context configuration providing deployment-specific context and configuration data for module execution                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| - [custom_aspects](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_custom_aspects )                           | No      | array            | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Array of custom CDK aspects for advanced deployment customization and cross-cutting                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| - [custom_naming](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_custom_naming )                             | No      | object           | No         | Same as [custom_naming](#domains_additionalProperties_custom_naming )                                                           | Custom naming configuration for module-specific resource naming conventions enabling                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| - [mdaa_compliant](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_mdaa_compliant )                           | No      | boolean          | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Flag indicating whether the module implements MDAA-compliant behaviors and security controls                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| - [mdaa_version](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_mdaa_version )                               | No      | string           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | MDAA version override for module-specific version control enabling selective version management across modules                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| - [module_config_data](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_module_config_data )                   | No      | object           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Module configuration data providing direct configuration parameters for module execution                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| - [module_configs](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_module_configs )                           | No      | array of string  | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Array of module configuration file paths for module configuration compilation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| - [module_path](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_module_path )                                 | No      | string           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Module path specification for MDAA module location and source identification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| - [module_type](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_module_type )                                 | No      | enum (of string) | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Module type specification controlling deployment engine selection for MDAA module orchestration                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| - [postdeploy](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_postdeploy )                                   | No      | object           | No         | In #/definitions/HookConfig                                                                                                     | Post-deployment hook configuration for custom validation and cleanup operations after module deployment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| - [predeploy](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_predeploy )                                     | No      | object           | No         | Same as [postdeploy](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_postdeploy ) | Pre-deployment hook configuration for custom validation and setup operations before module deployment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| - [tag_config_data](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_tag_config_data )                         | No      | object           | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Tag configuration data providing direct tagging parameters for resource tagging strategy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| - [tag_configs](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_tag_configs )                                 | No      | array of string  | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Array of tag configuration file paths for resource tagging strategy compilation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| - [terraform](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_terraform )                                     | No      | object           | No         | In #/definitions/TerraformConfig                                                                                                | Terraform-specific configuration for modules using Terraform deployment engine enabling                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| - [use_bootstrap](#domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_use_bootstrap )                             | No      | boolean          | No         | -                                                                                                                               | Flag controlling CDK bootstrap environment usage for module deployment enabling bootstrap                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

###### <a name="domains_additionalProperties_env_templates_additionalProperties_modules_additionalProperties_allow_cross_reference_stack"></a>5.1.5.1.6.1.4. Property `root > domains > additionalProperties > env_templates > additionalProperties > modules > additionalProperties > allow_cross_reference_stack`

|              |           |
| ------------ | --------- |
| **Type**     | `boolean` |
| **Required** | No        |

**Description:** Enable this flag to allow native cross region stack references.
Enabling this will create a CloudFormation custom resource in both the producing stack and consuming stack in order to perform the export/import.
Required for resources that must be created in us-east-1 but referenced from other regions (e.g., WAF ACLs for CloudFront)

## <a name="permissions_boundary_arn"></a>13. Property `root > permissions_boundary_arn`

|              |          |
| ------------ | -------- |
| **Type**     | `string` |
| **Required** | No       |

**Description:** IAM permissions boundary policy ARN. When specified, the managed policy
is applied as a permissions boundary to all IAM roles across all stacks.
Supports hierarchy: can be set at the top level, domain, or environment level.
A child value overrides the parent. This is a first-class config field and
cannot be overridden via generic context blocks.
